payload.title: Spike: quotas, abuse prevention & billing model
payload.description:
OPEN QUESTION: How do we meter, protect, and monetize the service?

Lower priority — gated behind validation (the validate spike) and the existence of real tenants, but worth capturing so it isn't an afterthought.

Questions to resolve:
- Rate limiting strategy (token bucket / sliding window — Trebuchet security skill has patterns) per tenant and per principal.
- Quotas: events/day, workspaces, seats, storage, connection count — what are the natural limits and how are they enforced + surfaced to users?
- Abuse model: what does a malicious or runaway client look like, and how do we contain it?
- Pricing shape: per-seat vs per-workspace vs flat vs usage-based (informed by the validation spike findings).
- Billing integration (Stripe?) and the free-tier boundary.

Deliverable: comment with a proposed quota + pricing model. Likely spawns concrete stories once pricing is chosen.
